key_quote: Proposition 4.1 is mathematically thin: monotone shared representation → |τ|=1 is nearly definitional, and the ε-bound lacks tightness analysis
rationale: The metric redundancy finding and DivFlow framework have acknowledged novelty. The primary blockers are thin propositions, single-model evaluation, missing distributional analysis, and absent information-theoretic baselines — all depth/rigor issues that would be resolved by stronger execution.
